response.justification: While this candidate demonstrates strong general software engineering skills across multiple domains, they lack critical required qualifications: native-level Japanese language proficiency (explicit requirement), deep C programming expertise for embedded systems, and no demonstrated security domain knowledge (cryptography, authentication, threat detection). Their extensive background is primarily in web, mobile, and high-level systems rather than embedded firmware development or kernel-level work. The role requires focused expertise in embedded networking security, which is not reflected in this resume.
strengths: 27 years of diverse software engineering experience with multiple staff-level roles demonstrating senior technical capability and architectural thinking
Proven infrastructure and DevOps expertise with CI/CD, Docker, and deployment systems that could support embedded development workflows
Polyglot programmer with C/C++ experience and demonstrated ability to learn new technical domains and contribute across the stack
concerns: No Japanese language proficiency despite being an explicit native-level requirement for the position
Background predominantly in web, mobile, and high-level systems with minimal evidence of embedded firmware, kernel-level work, or low-level hardware interaction
No demonstrated expertise in security technologies (cryptography, MACsec, 802.1X, encryption, threat detection) which are core responsibilities of this role

key_factors.factor: Domain mismatch: web/mobile expertise vs embedded security firmware
Strong general software engineering fundamentals and seniority level
